steps:
- checkout: self
  clean: true
  persistCredentials: true

- task: PowerShell@2
  displayName: Debug repo paths
  inputs:
    targetType: inline
    script: |
      Write-Host "Repo root contents:"
      Get-ChildItem -Path . -Force

      Write-Host ""
      Write-Host "src contents:"
      Get-ChildItem -Path .\src -Force

      Write-Host ""
      Write-Host "IntServices contents:"
      Get-ChildItem -Path .\src\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices -Force

      Write-Host ""
      Write-Host "Checking solution path:"
      Write-Host (Test-Path '.\src\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions.sln')

      Write-Host ""
      Write-Host "Checking csproj path:"
      Write-Host (Test-Path '.\src\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions.csproj')

- template: elz_local/dotnetcore-build.yml
  parameters:
    buildConfiguration: Release
    buildSolution: ${{ parameters.buildSolution }}
    publishProjects: ${{ parameters.publishProjects }}
    nugetConfigPath: ${{ parameters.nugetConfigPath }}
    nuGetServiceConnections: ${{ parameters.nuGetServiceConnections }}
